NIBSDescription: Anodal tDCS, anode over left M1 (C3) and cathode over right supraorbital (Fp2), 2 mA for 20 min with 10 s ramps. Delivered offline between two resting-state fMRI runs.

ElementSet.ElectrodePreparation: Skin cleaned with alcohol; saline-soaked sponge electrodes.
Skin cleaned with alcohol; saline-soaked sponge electrodes.

nibs_event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type with a unique parameter set. Linked to nibs_event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

stimulator_id.Description: Device generating the waveform. Links to StimulatorSet.StimulatorID.

nibs_element_id.Description: Elements delivering stimulation, in order. Links to ElementSet.ElementID. Multiple simultaneous electrodes are delimited.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

stimulus_intensity.Description: Delivered current per element, in the same order as nibs_element_id. For tES the values sum to 0.

stimulus_duration.Description: Duration of the constant-current block (excluding nothing; ramps are part of it).

ramp_up.Description: Duration of the linear current ramp at the start of the block.

ramp_down.Description: Duration of the linear current ramp at the end of the block.

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor used to set the intensity. 'absolute' means the value is specified directly (no method). Closed vocabulary (rMT, aMT, 1mV, e-field, absolute).

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier applied to the reference value, or 'absolute' for a directly specified value.

contact_impedance.Description: Device-reported contact impedance per electrode, in the same order as nibs_element_id.
